objective: Bootstrap the signed SwiftUI application shell and separated Swift package/test targets without implementing a device feature.
deliverables: Signed minimal SwiftUI app target and separated ArkDeckKit package targets.
Unit/contract test targets and zh-Hans/en String Catalog skeleton.
Clean-build and launch evidence for the exact Xcode/toolchain version.

verification.method: Clean build, signature inspection and clean-user launch smoke.
verification.expectedEvidence: The signed app launches and the App/Core/Process/Runtime/OpenHarmony/Workflow/Storage target boundaries remain separate.

stopConditions: Full Xcode is unavailable or the selected toolchain cannot produce a signed launchable app.
The shell requires a Core behavior, contract or entitlement decision not present in the approved platform profile.
